# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI change
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional change)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project style (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md (under `## Unreleased`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if applicable (README, API.md, etc.)

## Security Considerations
<!-- For cryptographic changes, describe any security implications -->
- [ ] No security implications
- [ ] Reviewed for timing attacks / side-channels
- [ ] Reviewed for key/nonce reuse
- [ ] Reviewed for proper validation of untrusted input

## Related Issues
<!-- e.g., "Closes #123", "Related to #456" -->
